title: Designing Incident Reporting Systems for Harms from General-Purpose AI
summary_en: We introduce a conceptual framework and provide considerations for the institutional design of AI incident reporting (IR) systems, i.e., processes for collecting information about safety- and rights-related events caused by general-purpose AI.
title_cn: 通用人工智能致害事件报告系统设计

title: Infinite Potential—Insights from the Viral Uplift Scenario: After-Action Report from a Sequence of Day After Artificial General Intelligence Exercises
summary_en: In this after-action report, the authors describe a series of exercises centered on the misuse of artificial intelligence models to generate novel biological threats and intended to elicit policy options that could help reduce the risks and impact.
title_cn: 无限潜能——来自病毒式提升场景的洞见：通用人工智能问世次日系列演练事后报告
